title: orchestrator_output
description: Output schema for the orchestrator agent defining tasks for slots.

plan.description: Overall progress plan and current status description.

slot_a_task.description: Disjoint task description for worker slot A. Empty if no task assigned.

slot_a_active.description: True if worker slot A should run this iteration.

slot_b_task.description: Disjoint task description for worker slot B. Empty if no task assigned.

slot_b_active.description: True if worker slot B should run this iteration.

status.description: Current loop status decided by the orchestrator.
